text:
Three little pigs… set off to build houses.
"Good luck!" said Mama.

Biggie built a straw house.
So fast!

Woody built a stick house.
Bricky built a brick house.
So strong!

Wolf came!
"Let me in!"
"No!"
WHOOSH!
The straw house fell down!

Wolf came again!
"Let me in!"
"No!"
CRASH!
The stick house fell too!

All three hid in the brick house.
"We're safe!"

HUFF… PUFF…
Can't blow it down!
Wolf ran away!
Three little pigs had a happy dinner together!
